title: Depreciation Methods: Depreciation expense reduces the carrying amount of an asset over...
summary: Assess how depreciation expense reduces the carrying amount of an asset over its useful life.
prompt: Depreciation expense reduces the carrying amount of an asset over its useful life.
solution: Depreciation expense systematically allocates the cost of a tangible asset over its useful life, reducing the asset's carrying amount on the balance sheet. This principle is essential in accounting for long-lived assets.
